full_text:
Zhu Fu śúĪśíę
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Fu (śúĪśíę)was born in Kuaiji. Took in refugees from the north, forced to flee as his officers sparked revolts. Zhu Fu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
